sounds.prompt: Three wooden dice rolling across a worn stone tabletop. Short warm wood clatter.
A single wooden die stopping on stone. Small wood tap and scrape.
A steel weapon hit landing on armor or a shield. Short heavy impact.
A heavier weapon strike landing harder than a normal hit. Deep impact and brief gear rattle.
A weapon hitting flesh through light armor. Body impact and a short pain breath.
An enemy body collapsing onto stone. Gear rattle and a final thud.
A shield blocking a weapon hit. Leather strap strain and a muted metal impact.
Armor giving way under a heavy hit. Strap snap, plate crack, small pieces falling.
A devastating finishing hit. Very heavy steel and body impact with a little debris.
Rough bone dice thrown onto stone. Hollow clatter and a fast stop.
Leather boots walking across a stone dungeon floor. One or two grounded steps.
A heavy dungeon door opening into another room. Hinge movement and a low wood or stone body.
Boots going down a few stone steps. Close footsteps and a short stairwell resonance.
An old wooden chest opened by hand. Heavy lid lift, hinge creak, hollow chest body.
A wooden barrel lid worked loose by hand. Wood scrape and short hollow barrel body.
A small metal lockbox opened by hand. Latch click, lid lift, muted iron body.
A small object picked up from stone by hand. Soft hand contact and a short object tap.
A few old coins scooped up from stone into a hand or pouch. Muted coin clinks.
An overfilled pack refusing one more item. Dull bag thump and strap strain.
A wooden shop door opening and one step onto a timber floor.
A few coins counted onto a wooden counter. Short muted coin clinks.
A few coins dropped into a leather pouch. Soft coin movement and leather rustle.
A small glass vial uncorked and drunk. Short liquid swig and swallow.
A practical recovery cue. Cloth adjustment, steadier breath, gear settling.
A shield lifted into guard. Leather straps tighten and metal settles.
A small wood and brass button pressed once. Short muted mechanical click.
A parchment folio opened by hand. Thick old paper and wood backing moving.
A parchment folio closed by hand. Thick paper fold and a soft cover settle.
A trap mechanism firing in a stone room. Spring snap and a short metal strike.
An ancient lock mechanism disengaging. Heavy internal movement and a final thunk.
A lock mechanism jamming. Short grind and a dull stop.
A reinforced dungeon door unlocking. Thick key turn, bolt movement, heavy iron mechanism.
A massive gate opening and one huge approaching footstep. Heavy stone and iron movement.
A huge enemy collapsing onto stone. Heavy body fall, debris, and a final impact.
Three wooden dice thrown harder across stone. Denser clatter and a short skid.
A short toss of wooden dice onto stone. Compact clatter and a fast stop.
A single wooden die settling softly on stone. Light tap and tiny scrape.
A single wooden die landing with more weight on stone. Firmer tap and short scrape.
A heavy blade or axe hit landing on armor. Thick metal body and a heavy impact.
A blunt weapon hit landing on armor or bone. Dense body impact with almost no ring.
A severe blade strike landing cleanly. Deep impact and brief gear rattle.
A crushing critical hit from a heavy blunt weapon. Dense force and a short debris shake.
A massive finishing blow. Huge steel and body impact with low-end weight.
A heavy shield stopping a hard weapon hit. Thick impact and strap strain.
Armor breaking badly under force. Hard buckle failure, plate crack, fragments on stone.
A humanoid enemy hit by a weapon. Flesh, cloth, and light gear impact.
A humanoid enemy collapsing onto stone. Light armor settle and a final breath.
Humanoid enemy attack prep. Knucklebones rattled in a hand and thrown onto stone.
A beast hit by a weapon. Hide and muscle impact with a short pain bark.
A beast collapsing onto stone. Claw scrape, body fall, final breath.
A beast readying an attack. Claws skitter on stone and a short low growl.
A weapon hitting a heavy ooze body. Wet splat and dull slap on stone.
An ooze collapsing and spreading across stone. Thick slosh and a final wet slump.
An ooze attack windup. Sticky wet movement and a heavier slop on stone.
A weapon striking an undead body. Dry bone rattle and hollow body impact.
Undead bones and scraps of gear collapsing onto stone. Brittle clatter.
Undead attack prep. Bone rattle and scraping movement over stone.
A weapon passing through a dark spirit body. Low air pull and a muted tear.
A dark spirit collapsing inward and fading out. Low air drop and soft unravel.
A spirit readying an attack. Dark air swirl and a short low whisper.
A weapon striking insect chitin. Dry shell crack and a short leg scrape.
An insect body dropping onto stone. Brittle chitin crack and leg scrape.
Insect attack prep. Fast legs skittering across stone.
A very heavy stone door dragging open. Dense scrape, hinge movement, new room air.
Boots going down several stone steps. Cloth movement and a short stairwell resonance.
A wooden chest opened by hand, then a brief rummage through its contents.
A barrel lid moved aside, then a brief rummage inside the barrel.
A small lockbox latch released and the lid snapping open.
A few loose coins lifted from stone into a hand. Short muted coin taps.
A few coins slid into a small leather pouch. Soft coin clinks and leather movement.
Coins counted on a wooden merchant counter. One firmer final clink.
Coins dropped into a leather pouch as payment. Soft clinks and pouch movement.
A small leather or cloth item picked up from stone by hand.
A small metal item picked up from stone by hand. Short muted metal tap.
A small medicinal vial uncorked and swallowed. Glass movement and a bitter exhale.
A larger flask opened and drunk. Cork pull, heavier gulp, glass and leather movement.
A bandage wrapped and tightened around an injury. Cloth pull and a restrained relieved breath.
An herbal remedy crushed or chewed by hand. Leaves, hand movement, quiet recovering breath.
A quick ration or tonic taken for recovery. Small bite or sip and a steadying breath.
A strengthening tonic uncorked and swallowed. Bottle movement and a steadier breath.
A cleansing draught opened and swallowed. Small bottle movement and a clearing breath.
A small carved token used in the hand. Short wood or bone click and leather movement.
A small metal tool working a mechanism. Pick or lever click and scrape.
A quick field repair. Strap tighten, buckle cinch, and a small metal adjustment.
A weapon readied in the hand. Grip shift, leather movement, muted metal contact.
Armor being fastened into place. Leather straps tightened and metal settling.
A small accessory clasped into place. Short clasp click and cloth movement.
A piece of gear removed. Short unfasten movement and muted leather or metal contact.
A small item dropped onto stone. Short thud or tap.
An old parchment note unfolded and handled. Thick paper movement and a soft settle.
A short rest on a bedroll or stone edge. Cloth rustle, weight shift, slow relieved breath.
A quick escape across stone. Fast footsteps, gear clatter, hard turn away.
A failed escape. Abrupt stop, gear jolt, and a blocked impact on stone.
A locked dungeon door tested and stopped by the lock. Heavy handle pull and short rattle.
A small iron key turning in a lock. One solid click and a short bolt release.
A merchant room door opening, one step onto timber, quiet room beyond.
A soft wood or paper tab click. Small muted interface movement.
A small book or folio opened by hand. Old paper and leather movement.
A small book or folio closed by hand. Paper fold and a muted cover thump.
A deeper ancient mechanism unlocking. Heavy stone movement and a low final thunk.
A lock mechanism catching and failing. Teeth grind and a dull stop.
A reinforced door bolt retracting under tension. Thick iron mechanism and a deep click.
A massive gate opening for a boss entrance. Dense stone and iron movement and one heavy step.
A giant foe collapsing onto stone. Heavy body fall, debris, and lingering gear scatter.
A leather boot stepping once onto dusty stone. Heel then toe, soft grit.
Two leather boot steps going down worn stone stairs.
A leather boot crossing a low stone threshold into a new room.
A boot stopping against blocked stone with a dull hand touch on masonry.
A small stone panel sliding aside to reveal stairs. Grit, dust, hollow opening.
Three carved wooden dice rolling across a stone tabletop. Short warm clatter.
A single carved wooden die set down and held on stone. Soft tap and fingertip contact.
A single carved wooden die nudged loose on stone. Small scrape and light tap.
A steel blade hit landing in flesh through light gear. Firm close impact.
A heavier melee strike landing through flesh with extra force. Deep body impact.
The player taking a hit through cloth and leather armor. Body thud and strap jostle.
A hit absorbed by leather armor and a little chain. Muted defended impact.
Worn leather armor failing under force. Strap snap and leather tear.
A small enemy hit in flesh through cloth. Short body buckle.
A weapon striking insect chitin. Dry shell crack.
A weapon passing through a spectral body. Low air pull and a soft tear.
A weapon striking a stone crystal creature. Dense rock hit and a small mineral crack.
A small body collapsing onto stone. Cloth movement and a short final drop.
A spectral body collapsing inward and fading out. Short low unravel.
A crystal body breaking into pieces on a stone floor.
A large crystal body splitting into smaller crystal pieces. Hard fracture and shard fall.
An old wooden crate opened by hand. Rough boards and a small worn hinge.
A dusty wooden chest opened by hand. Heavy lid, old hinge, hollow body.
An oak barrel lid worked loose by hand. Wood friction and short hollow body.
An old iron lockbox opened by hand. Latch release, heavy lid, short cavity body.
A loose stone pulled aside by hand to reveal a small wall nook.
A few old coins gathered from stone into a hand or pouch.
A heavy old parchment picked up from stone by hand. Dry paper movement.
A small hard item picked up from stone by hand. Short lift and object tap.
An old iron key turning in a worn lock. Grit, resistance, final release.
A reinforced timber and iron dungeon door unlocking and opening a little.
A wooden shop door opening into a small merchant room. One soft step inside.
A few coins dropped into a leather pouch.
A few coins placed into a hand or pouch.
A small glass vial picked up in one hand. Light liquid shift.
A small corked vial opened and drunk. Glass, liquid, swallow.
Cloth and gear settling after recovery. A steadier breath.
A body lowering onto a bedroll or stone edge. Cloth and gear settle.
An old parchment folio opened by hand. Thick paper and wood backing.
An old parchment folio closed by hand. Thick paper fold and a quiet settle.
A small wood and brass control pressed once. Short muted click.
A dull stop when a wood control meets resistance.
A parchment folio or small ledger closed with a quiet final settle.
A heavy stone guardian shifting its weight on a stone floor.
A heavy stone guardian collapsing onto a stone floor. Weighty final settle.
